name: Google Workspace Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active google_workspace accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.creation_time AS created_at FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND u.last_login_time IS NULL AND u.creation_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
